code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:8080/api/auth';class AuthService{login(username,password){return axios.post(API_URL+'/login',{username,password});}register(username,password,role){return axios.post(API_URL+'/register',{username,password,role:role?[role]:['ROLE_CANDIDATE']});}logout(){localStorage.removeItem('token');}getToken(){return localStorage.getItem('token');}saveToken(token){localStorage.setItem('token',token);}isLoggedIn(){return!!this.getToken();}}export default new AuthService();
